headline: Amazon Deepens Digital Health Push As Logistics Deal Supports Valuation
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) is rolling out its AI powered healthcare assistant to all customers, expanding access beyond existing One Medical members. Air Transport International's pilot union has reached a tentative labor agreement with management after five years of talks, affecting a key part of Amazon's air cargo network. These developments touch both Amazon's digital health ambitions and the operational reliability of its logistics operations. At a share price of $207.67, Amazon.com...

headline: Efficiency at All Costs: Meta Eyes 20% Jobs Bloodbath to Fund AI Empire
summary: Artificial intelligence is poised to reshape business operations in profound ways — delivering breakthroughs in productivity, innovation, and problem-solving that could unlock unprecedented economic growth. Yet this transformation carries a steep downside: widespread job displacement. Across industries, companies are announcing mass layoffs, shedding thousands of roles at once as automation takes hold. headline: Iran wages economic war in hopes of outlasting U.S. and Israel
summary: As American and Israeli armed forces hunt Iranian missile launchers, radar sites and warships, Iran is taking aim at a different set of targets: the civilian institutions that define the modern age of globalization.
